query:
UPDATE grading_jobs
            SET status = 'queued',
                worker_id = NULL,
                claimed_at = NULL,
                started_at = NULL,
                lease_expires_at = NULL,
                last_heartbeat_at = NULL,
                failure_reason = $3,
                failure_message = $4,
                failure_retryable = true
            WHERE id = $1
              AND worker_id = $2
